violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with a slight accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Ice buildup observed in the following -grocery freezer -bakery walk-in cooler -seafood walk-in freezer -Prepared foods freezer Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024
bakery department walk-on cooler and seafood department walk-in cooler observed with inadequate lighting. Per PIC they will get brighter lighting. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Self serve bagels and muffins are lacking label information. Self serve food in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. An employee placed a book with all the required information with the bagel and muffin display cases. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The loading dock door to the outside, located in the produce area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The walk-in cooler in the bakery department is in poor repair. An ice accumulation was observed on the ceiling and was dripping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
